## Checklist
**Before submitting**:
- [ ] Code has been formatted/linted (e.g., via pre-commit)
- [ ] Unit tests have been added or updated for new features/bug fixes
- [ ] Relevant documentation (README, docstrings, or examples) has been updated

**After submitting**:
- [ ] Addressed any feedback or requested changes from maintainers
